column2: # Yamanote headway plot — uses FIXED headway_profile.csv
# Run fix_headways.R first to regenerate the source data
wk_peak <- wk %>% filter(hour %in% 8:9) %>% pull(median_hw_min) %>% median(na.rm = TRUE)
", trains arrive every ", round(median_hw_min, 1), " minutes on average."
geom_ribbon(data = wk, aes(x = hour, ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
geom_ribbon(data = we, aes(x = hour, ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
annotate("text", x = 8,  y = y_max, label = "AM rush",
annotate("text", x = 17, y = y_max, label = "PM rush",
# The story: how flat the line is
annotate("segment", x = 8, xend = 17, y = wk_peak, yend = wk_peak,
label = paste0("~", round(wk_peak, 1), " min all peak hours"),
title = "Yamanote Line — Minutes between trains by hour",
subtitle = paste0("Lower = more frequent  •  Ref. station: ", ref,
"  •  Shaded = IQR  •  Source: JR East GTFS"),
x = "Hour of day", y = "Minutes between trains", color = NULL
xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE),
yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE)
config(displayModeBar = FALSE, scrollZoom = FALSE, doubleClick = FALSE)
